// Intentional non-compiling input used by tests/test_stale_api_fixture.py.
// It captures common pre-v5 migration mistakes and is never imported or built.
import { Tldraw } from '@tldraw/tldraw'

editor.createShape({ type: 'rectangle', props: { text: 'Legacy label' } })
editor.store.getSnapshot()
editor.exportToBlob({ format: 'png' })
editor.batch(() => {})
editor.setSelectedShapeIds([])

export const legacyTheme = <Tldraw darkMode />
